languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

languages.text: "Брось! Здесь стало светлее и чище, меньше крови. Все познается в сравнении — видела бы ты, где лечат жителей Футфолла".
"Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."
languages.original_text: "Брось! Здесь стало светлее и чище, меньше крови. Все познается в сравнении — видела бы ты, где лечат жителей Футфолла".

traits.locale_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."
"Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."
"Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

languages.text: 「そんなことないよ。もっと明るく、もっときれいで、血も少ない。すべては相対的なんだ。フットフォールの人たちが医療を受ける場所を見てみればわかるよ」
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: 「そんなことないよ。もっと明るく、もっときれいで、血も少ない。すべては相対的なんだ。フットフォールの人たちが医療を受ける場所を見てみればわかるよ。」

languages.text: « Balivernes ! C'est plus lumineux, plus propre, et il y a moins de sang. Tout est relatif ; vous devriez voir les endroits où les habitants de Castel vont se faire soigner. »
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: « Balivernes ! C'est plus lumineux, plus propre, et il y a moins de sang. Tout est relatif ; vous devriez voir les endroits où les habitants de Castel vont se faire soigner. »

languages.text: "Unsinn! Er ist heller und sauberer, und es gibt weniger Blut. Das ist alles relativ ... Ihr solltet sehen, wo sich die Leute auf Footfall medizinisch behandeln lassen."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: "Unsinn! Er ist heller und sauberer, und es gibt weniger Blut. Das ist alles relativ ... Ihr solltet sehen, wo sich die Leute auf Footfall medizinisch behandeln lassen."

languages.text: "Saçmalık! Daha aydınlık, daha temiz ve daha az kan var. Her şey göreceli. Binliman'daki insanların tıbbi tedavi için gittikleri yeri görmelisin."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık! Daha aydınlık, daha temiz ve daha az kan var. Her şey göreceli. Binliman'daki insanların tıbbi tedavi için gittikleri yeri görmelisin."

languages.text: «¡Bobadas! Está más limpio y mejor iluminado, y hay menos sangre. Todo es relativo; debería ver la pocilga donde atienden a los heridos y enfermos en Paso».
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: «¡Bobadas! Está más limpio y mejor iluminado, y hay menos sangre. Todo es relativo; debería ver la pocilga donde atienden a los heridos y enfermos en Paso».

languages.text: “瞎扯！现在明明更亮堂干净，血迹也少了。凡事都怕比较——你真该看看落脚港的人都是去哪儿求医问药的。”
languages.original_text: "Nonsense! It's brighter and cleaner, and there's less blood. Everything's relative — you should see where the people on Footfall go for their medicae treatment."

traits.locale_text: “瞎扯！现在明明更亮堂干净，血迹也少了。凡事都怕比较——你真该看看落脚港的人都是去哪儿求医问药的。”
